questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given underlined word. The company is looking for a viable solution to reduce costs without affecting quality.
questions.explanation: A) Viable(adjective) – Sustainable, Feasible, Workable, Practical, Profitable टिकाऊ Antonym: Impractical(adjective) – Not realistic, Unworkable, Unfeasible (अव्यावहारिक) Sustainable(adjective) – Maintainable, Enduring, Viable (सतत) Workable(adjective) – Practical, Achievable, Doable (कार्यसाध्य) Feasible(adjective) – Possible, Realistic, Viable (संभव)

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words underlined in the given sentence Milk is an easily-spoiled item that needs to be refrigerated to prevent it from spoiling.
questions.explanation: D)Perishable(adjective) – Likely to decay or go bad quickly खराब होने वाला

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined word(s) in the given sentence. Manik said that it is mandatory that each student pay his/her tuition fees every month.
questions.explanation: B) 'pay' के बदले'pays'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'each student' एक singular subject है और subject-verb agreement के अनुसार singular subject के साथ singular verb का प्रयोग होता है। वाक्य present tense में है, क्योंकि "it is mandatory" वर्तमान काल को दर्शा रहा है। अतः verb 'pays' का प्रयोग करना सही होगा। जैसे— It is required that each employee follows the rules properly. 'pays'will be used instead of 'pay' because "each student" is a singular subject, and according to the rule of subject-verb agreement, a singular subject takes a singular verb. The sentence is in the present tense as "it is mandatory" indicates the current obligation. Therefore, the use of the verb "pays" is correct. For example— It is required that each employee follows the rules properly.

questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given underlined word. The government introduced new policies to stabilise the economy after the crisis.
questions.explanation: B) Stabilise(verb) – Balance, Steady, Sustain, Secure, Maintain स्थिर करना Antonym: Disrupt(verb) – Disturb, Upset, Destabilize (अस्त-व्यस्त करना) Balance(verb) – Stabilize, Equalize, Adjust (संतुलित करना) Steady(verb) – Stabilize, Firm, Secure (मजबूत करना) Sustain(verb) – Maintain, Support, Continue (बनाए रखना)

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A. My husband would not be back until late and I decided to settle down in a comfortable chair and read a book. B. I put the children to bed early and prepared some coffee. C. It had been a tiring day and I was looking forward to a quiet evening. D. Soon I was sitting comfortably with a cup of coffee and the book.
questions.explanation: B) CABD It had been a tiring day and I was looking forward to a quiet evening. My husband would not be back until late and I decided to settle down in a comfortable chair and read a book I put the children to bed early and prepared some coffee Soon I was sitting comfortably with a cup of coffee and the book.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. The farmer stood by the roadside stand to sell his _________.
questions.explanation: D)Produce'का use होगा क्योंकि "produce" का अर्थ है फल, सब्जी, और अन्य कृषि उत्पाद जो किसान बेचते हैं। sentence में mention है कि किसान सड़क किनारे स्टैंड पर खड़े होकर अपना सामान बेच रहा है, इसलिए "produce" यहाँ सही है। जबकि "consequence" का अर्थ है परिणाम, "volume" का अर्थ है मात्रा, और "productivity" का अर्थ है उत्पादकता, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं हैं। 'Produce'will be used because it refers to fruits, vegetables, and other agricultural goods that farmers sell. The sentence mentions that the farmer is standing at the roadside stand to sell his goods, making "produce" appropriate here. 'Consequence' means a result, 'Volume' refers to the amount or quantity of something, 'Productivity' refers to efficiency in production, none of which fit in this context.

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. The company decided to change its tack in marketing, opting for a more digital approach to reach a wider audience.
questions.explanation: B) Tack(noun) – Approach, Strategy, Method, Plan, Direction रुख़/दिशा Synonym: Strategy(noun) – Tack, approach, plan, method, tactic रणनीति Energetic(adjective) – Full of energy and vitality; dynamic, active. ऊर्जावान Bitter(adjective) – Having a sharp, pungent taste or smell; unpleasantly sharp.कड़वा Delicious(adjective) – Highly pleasant to the taste; delightful, tasty.: स्वादिष्ट

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: C) The incorrect spelling in the given options is "Inflamous". The correct spelling is "Infamous", which means "well known for some bad quality or deed" (कुख्यात).

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blanks. He is going to _________ the campaign against excessive use of _________ in local production units.
questions.explanation: D)'Lead'का use सही है क्योंकि "lead" का अर्थ है किसी अभियान, प्रयास या गतिविधि का नेतृत्व करना। second blank में वाक्य में बताया गया है कि वह अत्यधिक use के खिलाफ अभियान चलाने जा रहा है, जिससे 'lead' उपयुक्त है। 'Protest' का अर्थ है विरोध करना, जो यहाँ सही नहीं है क्योंकि वाक्य नेतृत्व की बात कर रहा है।'Spice' का अर्थ है मसाले, जो इस संदर्भ में अप्रासंगिक है। 'Combat' का अर्थ है लड़ाई या मुकाबला करना, लेकिन यह 'lead' जैसा प्रभाव नहीं देता और यहाँ फिट नहीं बैठता। 'Lead'is the correct choice because it means to guide or head an effort, campaign, or activity. The sentence states that he is going to lead a campaign against the excessive use of something, making 'lead' appropriate. 'Protest' means to object or oppose, which doesn't align as the sentence focuses on leadership. 'Spice' means flavoring agents, irrelevant in this context.'Combat' means to fight or battle, but it does not convey the leadership aspect as 'lead' does

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. The two countries share a contiguous border that has been a point of contention and cooperation over the years.
questions.explanation: A) Contiguous(adjective) – Adjacent, Neighboring, Adjoining, Bordering, Connecting सटाहुआ Synonym: Adjacent(adjective) – Contiguous, neighboring, adjoining, next, bordering बगल का Accommodation(noun) – Lodging; a place to live or stay, typically temporarily. आवास Extravagant(adjective) – Excessive, lavish, spendthrift, wasteful. अत्यधिक Frugal(adjective) – Economical, sparing, thrifty, careful with resources. मितव्ययी

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: C) The correct spelling of ‘Celibrate’isCelebrate, which means "to acknowledge a significant or happy day or event with a social gathering or enjoyable activity" (हिंदी में: "किसी महत्वपूर्ण या खुशी के दिन या घटना को सामाजिक समारोह या आनंददायक गतिविधि के साथ मनाना।"

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words underlined in the given sentence To stay productive, she set aside a fixed period of time that you spend doing something each day, such as reading or exercising
questions.explanation: B)Stint(noun) – A fixed period of time that you spend doing something each day. कार्यावधि

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. The efficacy of the new vaccine was proven through extensive clinical trials.
questions.explanation: C) Efficacy(noun) – Effectiveness, Efficiency, Potency, Usefulness, Success प्रभावकारिता Synonym: Effectiveness(noun) – Efficiency, Usefulness, Potency, Impact (प्रभावशीलता) Failure(noun) – Defeat, Collapse, Breakdown, Flop (असफलता) Weakness(noun) – Frailty, Feebleness, Vulnerability, Limitation (कमजोरी) Doubt(noun) – Uncertainty, Skepticism, Distrust, Suspicion (संदेह)

questions.question: Select the most appropriate idiom to fill in the blank given the underlined segment in the following sentence The Chancellor must ________________ about his plans for increasing taxation.
questions.explanation: C)Come clean about(phrase) – To confess or admit something openly and honestly. सच-सच कहना Cast a long shadow over(idiom) – To have a negative influence that causes worry or sadness. प्रभाव डालना Lend an ear(idiom) – To listen to someone sympathetically. ध्यान से सुनना Find a middle ground(idiom) – To make a compromise between two opposing viewpoints. बीच का रास्ता निकालना

questions.question: In the following sentence the underlined part contains an error. Alternatives to the underlined part are given as options. Select the correct alternative. I want to buy the less expensive bike, but with the best mileage
questions.explanation: A) वाक्य में"less" का प्रयोग गलत है क्योंकि तुलना के संदर्भ में superlative degree का उपयोग होना चाहिए। यहाँ बाइक के"सबसे कम महंगे"विकल्प की बात की जा रही है। अतः"least expensive" सही विकल्प है। The use of "less" is incorrect because, in the context of comparison, the superlative degree should be used. The sentence refers to the "least expensive" option for a bike. Hence, "least expensive" is the

questions.question: Select the most appropriate idiom for the underlined segment. After years of heavy use, the old laptop began to stop functioning properly, no longer working well despite repeated repairs.
questions.explanation: D)Grind to a halt(phrase) – To gradually slow down and stop working or functioning. धीरे-धीरे बंद हो जाना Double down on(idiom) – To strengthen one's commitment to a strategy or course of action. अपनी रणनीति पर डटे रहना Let one’s guard down(idiom) – To relax and stop being careful or vigilant. सतर्कता छोड़ देना Be no cakewalk(idiom) – To be difficult or challenging. आसान न होना

questions.question: Select the most appropriate phrasal verb/ idiom for the underlined segment. The manager worked hard to control the situation and prevent any further disruptions in the meeting
questions.explanation: B) Rein in– To control or restrain something or someone. काबू करना Pan out– To turn out well or be successful. सफल होना Lash out– To suddenly attack or criticize someone. गुस्से में हमला करना Whip up– To excite or stir up emotions. उकसाना

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. The threat of El Nino (A) / has now ebbed, (B) / which had helped the (C) / monsoon regain momentum. (D)
questions.explanation: C)'which had helped'के बदले'helping'या'and it helped'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँrelative clause errorहै। Original structure में past perfect ("had helped") का प्रयोग अनावश्यक है क्योंकि main clause present perfect ("has ebbed") में है और दोनों actions (ebbing और helping) लगभग simultaneous हैं। जैसे—The rains stopped, helping the farmers resume work. •'helping'or'and it helped'will be used instead of'which had helped'due to arelative clause error. The past perfect ("had helped") is unnecessary here since the main verb ("has ebbed") is in present perfect, and both actions are concurrent. Like—The rains stopped, helping the farmers resume work.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. The sowing of summer crops (A) / such as rice, soybeans and corn (B) / have been (C) / lagging as a result. (D)
options: such as rice, soybeans and corn (B)
questions.explanation: C) 'have been'के बदले'has been'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँsubject-verb agreement errorहै। मुख्य subject"The sowing"(singular) है, इसलिए singular verb"has been"का प्रयोग होना चाहिए, न कि plural"have been"का; जैसे—The planting of trees has been delayed due to the rains. •'has been'will be used instead of'have been'because there is asubject-verb agreement error. The main subject"The sowing"(singular) requires the singular verb"has been", not the plural"have been"; Like—The planting of trees has been delayed due to the rains.

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A. However, physical fitness and a stubborn fearlessness never let a climber fail. B. The equipment can be made so light that no extra energy is spent in carrying it. C. To a large extent, the physical difficulties can be reduced by paying attention to the equipment. D. It is certain that weather plays an important part in the success or failure of mountain climbers.
questions.explanation: B)DCBA It is certain that weather plays an important part in the success or failure of mountain climbers To a large extent, the physical difficulties can be reduced by paying attention to the equipment The equipment can be made so light that no extra energy is spent in carrying it However, physical fitness and a stubborn fearlessness never let a climber fail

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Though people are becoming health-conscious these days, (1)________ simple lifestyle habits they are prone to fatal diseases. (2)________ a new study published in ‘The Journal of the American College of Cardiology’, (3)________ food more sparingly is linked to a lower risk of heart disease, heart failure , and ischemic heart disease. A significant risk factor for cardiovascular disease, high blood pressure, is demonstrated to be correlated (4)________ high sodium intake. As per the research, a person’s individual sodium intake over time may be predicted by how (5)____ they salt their food. It is found that people who do not put a little additional salt to their food very often had a much lower risk of heart disease event regardless of lifestyle factors and pre-existing disease. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: C)'Because of'का use होगा क्योंकि यह किसी क्रिया या स्थिति के कारण को स्पष्ट करता है। sentence का अर्थ यह बताने की कोशिश कर रहा है कि भले ही लोग स्वास्थ्य के प्रति जागरूक हो रहे हैं, लेकिन सरल जीवनशैली की आदतों के कारण वे अभी भी गंभीर बीमारियों के शिकार हो सकते हैं। 'For' का उपयोग कारण देने के लिए नहीं होता है, बल्कि यह अक्सर उद्देश्य या कारण बताने के लिए होता है। 'Because' एक conjunction है, जो clause को जोड़ता है, लेकिन यहाँ noun phrase 'simple lifestyle habits' है, जिसके कारण preposition 'because of' का उपयोग सही है। 'But' का उपयोग विरोधाभास दिखाने के लिए होता है, जो यहाँ उचित नहीं है। 'Because of'is correct as it explains the reason or cause of an action or situation. The sentence intends to convey that although people are becoming health-conscious, due to simple lifestyle habits, they are still prone to fatal diseases. 'For' does not indicate a reason directly but is often used for purpose or cause. 'Because' is a conjunction connecting clauses, but here the noun phrase 'simple lifestyle habits' makes the use of the preposition 'because of' appropriate. 'But' is used to show contrast, which does not fit the context here.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Though people are becoming health-conscious these days, (1)________ simple lifestyle habits they are prone to fatal diseases. (2)________ a new study published in ‘The Journal of the American College of Cardiology’, (3)________ food more sparingly is linked to a lower risk of heart disease, heart failure , and ischemic heart disease. A significant risk factor for cardiovascular disease, high blood pressure, is demonstrated to be correlated (4)________ high sodium intake. As per the research, a person’s individual sodium intake over time may be predicted by how (5)____ they salt their food. It is found that people who do not put a little additional salt to their food very often had a much lower risk of heart disease event regardless of lifestyle factors and pre-existing disease. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2
questions.explanation: A) ‘According to'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है "के अनुसार" या "के मुताबिक।" इस sentence में, एक नए अध्ययन का जिक्र किया गया है जो 'The Journal of the American College of Cardiology' में प्रकाशित हुआ है। यह अध्ययन हृदय रोगों के जोखिम और खाने की आदतों के बीच संबंध के बारे में बात कर रहा है। इसलिए, यहां "According to" सही उत्तर है क्योंकि यह सही तरीके से संदर्भ प्रदान करता है। "According with" गलत है क्योंकि यह grammatically incorrect है। Accordingly' का अर्थ होता है "उसी के अनुसार" और यह एक क्रिया विशेषण (adverb) है, जो वाक्य में स्वतंत्र रूप से प्रयोग किया जाता है, इसलिए यह सही नहीं होगा। ''In according with' भी व्याकरणिक रूप से गलत है क्योंकि सही संरचना "in accordance with" होती है। 'According to'will be used because it means "as per" or "in reference to." The sentence refers to findings from a new study published in 'The Journal of the American College of Cardiology.' Since the study is being introduced as the source of the information, "According to" is the appropriate choice. "According with" is grammatically incorrect. 'Accordingly' is an adverb meaning "in a corresponding manner," which does not fit here.'In according with' is also incorrect as the correct phrase is "in accordance with."

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Though people are becoming health-conscious these days, (1)________ simple lifestyle habits they are prone to fatal diseases. (2)________ a new study published in ‘The Journal of the American College of Cardiology’, (3)________ food more sparingly is linked to a lower risk of heart disease, heart failure , and ischemic heart disease. A significant risk factor for cardiovascular disease, high blood pressure, is demonstrated to be correlated (4)________ high sodium intake. As per the research, a person’s individual sodium intake over time may be predicted by how (5)____ they salt their food. It is found that people who do not put a little additional salt to their food very often had a much lower risk of heart disease event regardless of lifestyle factors and pre-existing disease. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: A)'Salting'का use होगा क्योंकि 'salting' का अर्थ है भोजन में नमक डालने की प्रक्रिया, और यह वाक्य में एक gerund के रूप में इस्तेमाल हो रहा है। sentence में यह दर्शाता है कि भोजन में नमक डालने की प्रक्रिया को नियंत्रित करना दिल की बीमारियों के कम जोखिम से जुड़ा हुआ है। Salt' पदार्थ को संदर्भित करता है, जबकि यहाँ प्रक्रिया की आवश्यकता है। Salt with' का प्रयोग वाक्य में अनावश्यक और गलत है। Salted' एक adjective है, जबकि यहाँ gerund की आवश्यकता है। Salting'will be used because it refers to the act of adding salt and is functioning as a gerund (verb-noun) here. The sentence contextually supports the idea that the process of adding salt sparingly correlates with reduced heart disease risk. SaltWrongbecause the sentence focuses on the action or process, not the substance. Salt withWrongas it is incomplete and does not fit the sentence grammatically or contextually.SaltedWrongbecause an adjective is not required; the focus is on the process.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Though people are becoming health-conscious these days, (1)________ simple lifestyle habits they are prone to fatal diseases. (2)________ a new study published in ‘The Journal of the American College of Cardiology’, (3)________ food more sparingly is linked to a lower risk of heart disease, heart failure , and ischemic heart disease. A significant risk factor for cardiovascular disease, high blood pressure, is demonstrated to be correlated (4)________ high sodium intake. As per the research, a person’s individual sodium intake over time may be predicted by how (5)____ they salt their food. It is found that people who do not put a little additional salt to their food very often had a much lower risk of heart disease event regardless of lifestyle factors and pre-existing disease. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4.
questions.explanation: B)'With'का use होगा क्योंकि "correlated with" एक सही grammatical collocation है जो दो चीजों के बीच संबंध (सहसंबंध) को दर्शाने के लिए प्रयोग किया जाता है। sentence में कहा गया है कि उच्च रक्तचाप का सहसंबंध उच्च सोडियम सेवन के साथ है, इसलिए 'with' सही विकल्प है। जबकि 'of' स्वामित्व या संबंध को दर्शाता है, 'for' उद्देश्य या लाभ को इंगित करता है, और 'in' स्थान या समय के लिए प्रयुक्त होता है, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। With'will be used because "correlated with" is the correct grammatical collocation to show the relationship between two things. The sentence indicates that high blood pressure is correlated with high sodium intake, making 'with' appropriate. Whereas 'of' signifies possession, 'for' denotes purpose or benefit, and 'in' refers to location or time, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Though people are becoming health-conscious these days, (1)________ simple lifestyle habits they are prone to fatal diseases. (2)________ a new study published in ‘The Journal of the American College of Cardiology’, (3)________ food more sparingly is linked to a lower risk of heart disease, heart failure , and ischemic heart disease. A significant risk factor for cardiovascular disease, high blood pressure, is demonstrated to be correlated (4)________ high sodium intake. As per the research, a person’s individual sodium intake over time may be predicted by how (5)____ they salt their food. It is found that people who do not put a little additional salt to their food very often had a much lower risk of heart disease event regardless of lifestyle factors and pre-existing disease. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5
questions.explanation: D) Frequently'का use होगा क्योंकि "frequently" का अर्थ है "अक्सर"। sentence में mention है कि जो लोग अपने भोजन में अक्सर अतिरिक्त नमक नहीं डालते हैं, उनके हृदय रोग का जोखिम कम होता है। इस वाक्य में यह आवृत्ति (frequency) को व्यक्त करता है, इसलिए यह सही विकल्प है। Hefty" का अर्थ है भारी या बड़ा। यह वाक्य में नमक डालने की आदत को व्यक्त नहीं करता है, इसलिए यह विकल्प गलत है। Soundly" का अर्थ है सुरक्षित या ठोस तरीके से। यह नमक डालने की आवृत्ति को व्यक्त नहीं करता है, इसलिए यह सही नहीं है Burly" का अर्थ है बलवान या शक्तिशाली। यह वाक्य के संदर्भ में अप्रासंगिक है। 'Frequently'will be used because it means "often." The sentence discusses how people who do not frequently add extra salt to their food have a significantly lower risk of heart disease. It appropriately conveys the idea of habit or frequency. Hefty" means large or heavy. This does not fit the context of the sentence as it does not relate to the frequency of adding salt. Soundly" means in a secure or thorough manner. It does not relate to how often salt is added Burly" means strong or muscular. This word is irrelevant in the context of adding salt to food.
